_publications._publicationTitle: Drug Responses in Plexiform Neurofibroma Type I (PNF1) Cell Lines Using High-Throughput Data and Combined Effectiveness and Potency.

_contextSnippet: ipNF05.5-MX cells showed resistance to a panel of TOP2A inhibitors, compared to the response of the control ipnNF95.11C cell line
details: Showed resistance to a panel of TOP2A inhibitors compared to control cell line
